item.name: Thaliak Crab
item.description:
Something of an anomaly among crabs as it spends its life moving back and forth between salt- and freshwater. Its flavor differs according to where it is caught.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: Although technically a type of river crab, this crustacean spends its larval stage in the sea. Once grown, it crawls up to dwell in the waters of the Thaliak, only to return to the ocean again and again in order to spawn.
